description: Tracks whether brands appear in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT Perplexity Gemini AI Overviews and other LLM search surfaces.
Analyzes how AI responses describe a brand including positive neutral negative sentiment and positioning language.
Compares brand visibility share of voice and positioning against competing AI search analytics and GEO platforms.
Monitors which URLs citations and source domains are used by AI answer engines when discussing a brand or category.
Provides actionable insights for improving brand presence content strategy and performance in AI-driven search results.
